channel.title: Smart Home Hardware Software Development on Home Smart Mesh
channel.description: Recent content in Smart Home Hardware Software Development on Home Smart Mesh

item.title: Switch Cover
item.description: Cover Dumb Switch with Smart Switch # STL Model 01 black and white 3dprints 02 black and white breakout 03 black and white back side

item.title: Web Three Interface
item.description: Webapp Three Interface Github Repo This repo contains webGL Three.js based interface demos for interactions with 3d data using mouse and touch. Final application # This repository has boilerplates samples. A real use case example is a 3d home model. While the focus of this repo is the 3d interactions only, this repo is used in another project linked below where it is connected to real devices and network libraries.

item.title: Datasheets
item.description: ESP32 # Datasheet # Datasheet Blockdiagram # Memory Map # Power Modes # WROOM Datasheet # ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet Pin Layout # ESP32-S2 # Datasheet # ESP32-S2 Datasheet Block Diagram # Memory # Power Modes # S2 Technical Reference Manual # TRM

item.title: Light rooms
item.description: Room light east and west # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-bc6c51b9555f0ff6"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-bc6c51b9555f0ff6"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } };

item.title: Raspi IoT
item.description: Raspi Github Repo Software # Raspbian OS Main services Mosquitto : https://mosquitto.org/ influxDB : https://www.influxdata.com/products/influxdb-overview/ mqtt2influx : py/influx Grafana : https://grafana.com/ graphql sensors : js/graphql x to mqtt Zigbee2mqtt : https://www.zigbee2mqtt.io/ nrf2mqtt : github nRF52_Mesh nrf_mesh miflora2mqtt : https://github.com/RaymondMouthaan/miflora-mqtt-daemon telegram bots2mqtt : js/telegraf based on https://github.com/telegraf/telegraf automation services Light control : py/hue Phantom Load cut : js/pc_control Heat cut : py/heating Home status : py/home_status Roborock button : py/hover user interface 3D webapp : https://github.

item.title: Simple Mesh
item.description: Simple Mesh Overview # A simpler, more efficient alternative to Z-x, BL-x, Thread, standard RF protocols. Open source SW is provided for custom and off the shelf nRF SoC tags and dongles. Simple Mesh SensorTag Simple Mesh Repo Features # 2.4 GHz 2 Mbps Mesh Network tested with 300 packets / second Flash time automated database config Zero install time configuration No association, No pairing, No factory resets Router = Coordinator = Repeater = Sniffer = CLI text serial line protocol Multiple Network endpoints No single point of failure Server, Dongles, Sensors Full Stack Open Source (no softdevices required) HW On the shelves optional DIY HW Alive trace routing a heartbeat message that gives info about the age and RF tx/rx hops through the route see below the Drivers & Custom Mesh protocol section for the RF Protocol details

item.title: Temperature
item.description: Hot summer # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-388b84c89c2369b2"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-388b84c89c2369b2"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } }; Xiaomi Aqara vs DIY BME280 # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-f8d70b01c18b3285"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.

item.title: Simple Mesh SensorTag
item.description: Networks / Simple Mesh Frameworks / Raspi IoT Tindie Product Page Concept # It is possible to mount either CR2032 or CR2477 Hardware # board render repo directory nRF52832 BME280 MAX44009 Schematics # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.

item.title: Project CHIP
item.description: Relates to # Zephyr RTOS Thread Protocol Overview # Definition # We can consider the project CHIP Connected Home Over IP definition as in two folds : a takeover of the Zigbee Cluster Library to be fit over the IP layer. The abstraction of all different transport protocols with IP This will avoid that each transport (e.

item.title: Thread SensorTag
item.description: Networks / Thread Frameworks / CHIP v1.0 MS8607 VEML6030 # The Thread sensorTag is based on an nRF52840 on a MS88SF2 module. The used sensors are VEMLS6030 for light and MS8607 for Temperature, Humidity and Pressure. commit nRF52840 MS88SF2 MS86072 VEML6030 Schematics # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.

item.title: Home 3D
item.description: Webapp 3D Github Repo Getting Started # host this project on your local raspberry pi or see ‘Local host vs Remote host’ section on how to use the live demo create your own glTF model from blender (optional) activate hue bridge connection # adjust the light names to match your hue lights names press the Hue Gateway authorisation button (on the real device) Click on the 3d model of the hue gateway An alert will apear on the screen to wait for confirmation The user creation will proceed and the username will be stored as local storage (ctrl+j in chrome to oben the debug window) activate mqtt connection # adjust the mqtt topic names to match your mqtt devices install a mosquitto version with websocket support Click on the 3d model of the mosquitto gateway Live demo # Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.

item.description: Cover Dumb Switch and smart Socket # STL Model Application # More details on the raspberry pi service

item.title: Voronoi
item.description: Webapp # runs with chrome as a web browser Full screen Open in a new page var button = document.getElementById("btn-f7ccb353b1174faa"); button.onclick = ()={ var elem = document.getElementById("ifm-f7ccb353b1174faa"); if (elem.requestFullscreen) { elem.requestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.webkitRequestFullscreen) { elem.webkitRequestFullscreen(); } else if (elem.msRequestFullscreen) { elem.msRequestFullscreen(); } }; Github repo # Voronoi generator webapp Github Repo 3d printing # Voronoi STL Models Description # Parametric Voronoi generator with real time editing and SVG export

item.title: Thread
item.description: Relates to # Zephyr RTOS Project CHIP Overview # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.6, minZoom: 0.5, maxZoom: 4, fit: true , contain: true , center: true , refreshRate: 'auto' }; let svg_pz = svgPanZoom('#svg-99adc38e71d7d1e9' ,params); window["svg_99adc38e71d7d1e9"] = svg_pz let button = document.

item.title: nRF52840 USB dongle
item.description: Product Page nRF52840 ARM M4 64 MHz 1024 KB ROM - 256 KB RAM Bluetooth 5, Mesh 802.15.4, Thread, Zigbee USB 2 GetStarted) Applications # custom mesh coordinator nRF52840 Dongle # Pinout # Serial Wire Debug # LEDS # LED1 Green : P0.06 LED2 Green : P0.08 LED2 Green : P1.

item.title: Home Assistant
item.description: Official Website Bluetooth # BLE Bluetooth Low Energy # This is a simple integration that tracks BLE devices and beacons without even requiring pairing (privacy notice might be required) BLE Tracker Bluetooth Mesh # One investigation path for integrating Bluetooth mesh in Home Assistant is bridging it through an ip layer using the Bearer Layer of the BLE Architecture BLE Mesh => IP => MQTT-SN => MQTT => Home Assistant

item.title: ESP32 remote
item.description: ESP32 Case for up/down remote control # STL models zip Application # More details on the ESP32 Arduino code 3D printing creation requires sometimes quite a number of iterations

item.title: Software
item.description: Arduino ESP32 # platform package as an idf component ESP-IDF # esp-idf esp-iot-solution mesh-dev-framework mdf prog guide Over The Air Update # >get_idf >idf.py set-target esp32 OTA Github Readme >idf.py menuconfig https://10.0.0.36:8070/hello-world.bin >cp ca_cert.pem ../simple_ota_example/server_certs/ >idf.py -p /dev/ttyUSB0 flash monitor on another linux host, copied ca_cert.pem then tested : >curl -v https://10.0.0.36:8070/simple_ota.bin --cacert ca_cert.pem > simple_ota.

item.title: Zigbee
item.description: Devices Overview # Below are examples of used devices in this project As in the above figure, I kept all the light with the hue gateway for a reliable function, and opted for zigbee2mqtt for all other non lighting devices. For a detailed list of used devices and their documentation see the devices list section Frameworks # Philips Hue # ✅ Philips Hue have an open API that can run in a local network, therefore allowing third party apps integration.

item.title: nRF52832 UART dongle
item.description: Board # A usb dongle from the market that includes a 2104 serial to usb converter. Keyword search on shopping websites : nRF52832 USB dongle. Aka “nRF52832-YJ-17017-USB-UART” Software # RF to Serial Gateway # The node connected through serial port will report messages in text format Local Events Upon startup such message is sent nodeid:75;channel:10;reset:1 Listening Upon activation of the uicr config is_listening the node starts acting as a gatewy that will report messages through serial in text mode

item.title: Zephyr RTOS
item.description: Relates to # Thread Protocol Project CHIP Windows # Install # Getting Started details... The details are in the link above, the summary of the step for installing on windows are Installing choco Installing west dependencies with choco installing west with pip the retrieving the repo and building are performed through west The compiler toolchain as multiple options Zephyr own SDK, not available on windows GNU ARM Embedded : to be installed on a path without spaces e.

item.title: Fisheye Cam OV3660
item.description: 3 Mega Pixels OV3660 Fisheye lens DFOV 120° Ultra low power, sleep current 2μA 270mAh battery PSRAM 8MB Product page # Fisheye Timer camera $20 Platformio porting # board definition # local file : boards\m5stack-timer-cam.json should be added to the platformio/platform-espressif32 repo still missing from v2.1.0 pins declaration # file required pins_arduino.h available on pins_arduino.h@1.0.5 not yet released Applications # wakeup # m5stack/Arduino wakeup example sep32home/Platformio wakeup example Build info PACKAGES: - framework-arduinoespressif32 0.

item.title: TTGO T-Display
item.description: Simple Example # t-display_controller dependencies # TFT_eSPI_ttgo_t-display fork from Bodmer/TFT_eSPI GfxUi lib_deps = https://github.com/ESP32Home/TFT_eSPI_ttgo_t-display.git#2.3.4_t-display https://github.com/ESP32Home/GfxUi.git#v1.0.1 Example Code # click to expand the example code... #include <Arduino.h>#include <TFT_eSPI.h>#include <SPI.h>#include "GfxUi.h"#include <SPIFFS.h> TFT_eSPI tft = TFT_eSPI(135, 240); GfxUi ui = GfxUi(&tft); void setup() { Serial.begin(115200); tft.init(); tft.setRotation(3); SPIFFS.begin(true);//FORMAT_SPIFFS_IF_FAILED ui.drawBmp("/esp_home.bmp", 0, 0);//'ui' needs tft and SPIFF tft.setCursor(0, 0); tft.

item.title: TTGO T5-EPaper
item.description: Simple example # epaper-TTGO-T5_1_2-hello dependencies # GxEPD lib_ldf_mode = deep+ lib_deps =GxEPD@3.1.0 Example # #include <SPIFFS.h>#include <epaper.h> EPaper epaper; void setup() { Serial.begin(115200); SPIFFS.begin(); epaper.init(); epaper.display.fillScreen(GxEPD_WHITE); epaper.drawBitmap("/esp_home.bmp", 0, 50, true); epaper.displayText("Hello simple", 20, EPaper::RIGHT_ALIGNMENT); epaper.display.update(); } void loop() { } Display # GxGDEW029Z10 2,9 Zoll White / Black / Red 296x128 References # LilyGo epaper ESP-IDF repo LilyGO/ESP32_T5Epaper_2.9inch fork from loboris/ESP32_ePaper_example LilyGo epaper platformio-arduino repo Xinyuan-LilyGO/T5-Ink-Screen-Series fork from TTGO-EPaper-Series Waveshare specification pdf 2.

item.title: M5 Stick Plus
item.description: 6-Axis IMU IR transmitter Microphone RTC LCD (1.14 inch) Lipo Battery Passive Buzzer Product page # m5stack M5StickC Plus $14 Display # 1.14 inch 135x240 Color TFT LCD ST7789v2
